message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant "AuthController" as AuthController
database AuthService
queue AuthenticationManager
entity SecurityContextHolder

Client ->> AuthController : POST /api/login\n{username,password}
activate AuthController
    note right of Client #lightgreen:green;line:red;text:black;shadow:false;\n# Request Body:\n{\n  \"email\": \"test@test.com\",\n  \"password\": \"123456\"\n}\nnote left of AuthController #yellow:line:dashed;color:#008B8B\ntext:white;fontSize=9pt \nPOST http://localhost/api/v1/authenticate/refresh-token?token=<jwt_token>\nendnote
    
    AuthController->AuthService: authenticate(LoginRequest) 
        activate AuthService
        
            AuthService->AuthenticationManager: authenticate(authenticationToken)\n(UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(email, password))  
                activate AuthenticationManager
                
                    loop Check Credentials
                        
                        alt Valid User & Password
                    
                            return Return authenticated user details
            
                        else Invalid credentials or disabled account
                            
                             throw BadCredentialsException("Invalid email/password")   
                             
                         end if    
                         
                     endloop     
                     
                 deactivate AuthenticationManager      
                 
             AuthenticationService<--return UserDetails(userDetails); // From DB via JPA Repository call here internally within service layer implementation logic not depicted explicitly but implied by flow directionality towards persistence storage systems like databases which would be represented typically using cylinder shapes though omitted due space constraints keeping focus high level interactions between components involved during authentication process itself rather than underlying data access mechanisms employed behind scenes such ORM frameworks etcetera...             
              create object JWTUtils.generateJwtFromUserPrincipal(_CD_-CartCS-CartLoadedOSCCubeCartInterspireShoppingCartWP-e-StoreEasyDigitalDownloadsMemberPressRestrictContentProPaidMemberships Pro
